texto: When a man I like touches my arm or my hair, I want to know if he'll touch the center of me, and whatever I learned in school--I went to school for a long time--I seem to believe that my center can be reached best with the tip of a penis....
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alice Mattison: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “When a man I like touches my arm or my hair, I want to know if he'll touch the center of me, and …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, relationships, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
